Augment Healing.name: Augment Healing
Augment Healing.description: Add +2 points per spell level to the amount of damage healed by any Conjuration [Healing] spell that you cast.

Combat Casting.name: Combat Casting
Combat Casting.description: You get a +4 bonus on Concentration checks made to cast a spell or use a spell-like ability while on the defensive.

Combat Reflexes.name: Combat Reflexes
Combat Reflexes.description: You may make a number of additional attacks of opportunity equal to your Dexterity bonus.

Deflect Arrows.name: Deflect Arrows
Deflect Arrows.description: Once per round when you would normally be hit with a ranged weapon, you may deflect it so that you take no damage from it. You must be aware of the attack and not flat-footed.

Deft Opportunist.name: Deft Opportunist
Deft Opportunist.description: You get a +4 bonus on attack rolls when making attacks of opportunity.

Dodge.name: Dodge
Dodge.description: You gain a +1 dodge bonus to your AC against attacks from your current target.

Improved Disarm.name: Improved Disarm
Improved Disarm.description: You do not provoke an attack of opportunity when you attempt to disarm an opponent, nor does the opponent have a chance to disarm you. You also gain a +4 bonus on the opposed attack roll you make to disarm your opponent.

Improved Grapple.name: Improved Grapple
Improved Grapple.description: You do not provoke an attack of opportunity when you make a touch attack to start a grapple. You also gain a +4 bonus on all grapple checks, regardless of whether you started the grapple.

Improved Trip.name: Improved Trip
Improved Trip.description: You do not provoke an attack of opportunity when you attempt to trip an opponent while you are unarmed. You also gain a +4 bonus on your Strength check to trip your opponent.

Improved Unarmed Strike.name: Improved Unarmed Strike
Improved Unarmed Strike.description: You are considered to be armed even when unarmed —that is, you do not provoke attacks of opportunity from armed opponents when you attack them while unarmed.

Mobility.name: Mobility
Mobility.description: You get a +4 dodge bonus to Armor Class against attacks of opportunity caused when you move out of or within a threatened area.

Skill Focus (Heal).name: Skill Focus (Heal)
Skill Focus (Heal).description: You get a +3 bonus on all checks involving that skill.

Spellcasting Prodigy (Healer).name: Spellcasting Prodigy (Healer)
Spellcasting Prodigy (Healer).description: Treat your primary spellcasting ability score as 2 points higher for determining bonus spells and save DCs. This feat can only be taken at 1st level.

Spring Attack.name: Spring Attack
Spring Attack.description: When using the attack action with a melee weapon, you can move both before and after the attack.

Stunning Fist.name: Stunning Fist
Stunning Fist.description: Stunning Fist forces a foe damaged by your unarmed attack to make a Fortitude saving throw (DC 10 + 1/2 your character level + your Wis modifier), in addition to dealing damage normally. A defender who fails this saving throw is stunned for 1 round.
